name: Ocean State Golf Academy
address: 860 Waterman Ave Unit 4, East Providence, RI 02914
about: Ocean State Golf Academy is a golf training facility in East Providence, RI, offering instruction for golfers of all skill levels. The academy provides a technology-driven environment with multiple indoor training stations equipped with advanced tools for skill development. They offer private coaching, group lessons, and utilize modern technology including TrackMan, RoboGolfPro, and Smart 2 Move pressure plates to provide instant feedback and faster improvement.
why_golfers_like_it: Technology-driven instruction using TrackMan, RoboGolfPro, and Smart 2 Move for instant feedback
Expert coaches who tailor programs to individual skill levels and goals
Welcoming and supportive environment that keeps learning enjoyable
Comprehensive facilities including driving range, putting green, and indoor practice area
Programs available for every skill level, from juniors to advanced players

food_and_drink.notes: No food or beverage service mentioned. Likely BYOB.

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch and ball tracking technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, it is recommended to bring your own clubs for lessons and practice sessions. They also offer Callaway custom club fitting services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any food or beverage service, suggesting it is likely a bring-your-own facility.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: This information is not specified on their website. As a training facility focused on instruction, their primary service is coaching, not 18-hole simulator rounds.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Ocean State Golf Academy is kid-friendly, offering specific junior programs and featuring a junior golfer using M.E.G.S.A. technology in their promotional materials.
